---
toc: false
---

# Nathen Byford

Skilled Statistician interested in applying statistics and data science techniques to analyze data and research applications to build a safer world.

## Work Experience
**Graduate Teaching Assistant**
: Baylor University | Department of Statistical Science 
: Waco, TX | August 2022 - Present

**Statistical Consultant**
: Baylor University | Department of Statistical Science
: Waco, TX | August 2023 - Present

**Undergraduate Researcher**
: Oregon State University
: Corvallis, OR | June 2021 - August 2021

**Summer Research Fellow**
: Baylor University | [MoWaTER Project](https://www.baylor.edu/mowater/)
: Remote | June 2020 - August 2020


## Education

**Master of Science | Baylor University**
: Statistics
: May 2022 - Present

**Bachelor of Science | Baylor University**
: Statistics
: May 2022
